name: Deep Fried Phoenix Tailed Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the shrimp shells down to the last section, leaving them attached.
2. Cut along the back of each shrimp and remove the intestinal vein.
3. Wash and pat the shrimp dry.
4. Cut the shrimp 3/4 of the way through along their inner curves and flatten with a cleaver or heavy knife.
5. Combine the sherry, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
6. Sprinkle the cut side of each shrimp with the mixture.
7. In a bowl, mix flour with cold water to form a smooth paste, then add baking powder.
8. Heat oil in a 12-inch wok or deep fryer until it forms a haze or reaches 375°F on a thermometer.
9. Dip shrimp by their tails into the batter, then carefully drop them into the hot oil.
10. Fry for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown, turning once or twice.
11. Drain fried shrimp in a paper-lined dish and keep warm in the oven while frying remaining shrimp.
